omitted_declarations.policy_reference: Registration Information: If you are required to register and create an account through our App, we will collect the Personal Data that you are required to provide us during the registry process, such as your full name and email address. Further, during the registration process you will be supplied with username and password for your account, at which time you thereby represent and warrant that you are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your details and password. You represent and warrant that you will not provide us with inaccurate, misleading or false information.
